title: AI model-launch event study
question: When a frontier AI model ships, does the software complex actually move?
finding: No. Across 113 software names and 11 launches the group's reaction sits at the 52nd percentile of a random-date placebo; the famous GPT-4 "crash" was the SVB banking week (-6.96% beta-1 cuts to -2.74% on a market model); the disruption gap (exposed vs insulated) reconciles to roughly zero with CIs on zero, and no cap bucket clears zero. The only consistent signal is relative: software beat semis in 7 of 10 launches (+1.07 pts avg), CI still on zero -- a pair to study, not a trade.
